name: trace-mcp-vscode
description: Auto-reindex on save for any MCP client running inside VS Code (Copilot Chat, Continue, Cline, Roo Code).

traceMcp.enabled.description: Reindex files on save by shelling out to the trace-mcp CLI. Disable to suspend without uninstalling.

traceMcp.commandPath.description: Path to the trace-mcp binary. Default resolves via PATH; set an absolute path if your install isn't on the GUI process's PATH (typical when installed via pipx, asdf, or a Node version manager).

traceMcp.debounceMs.description: Per-file debounce in milliseconds. Multiple saves of the same file inside this window collapse into a single reindex call.

traceMcp.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns whose matches are NOT reindexed on save. Matched against the workspace-relative path.

traceMcp.languages.description: Editor language IDs whose saves trigger a reindex. Files in other languages are ignored.

traceMcp.timeoutMs.description: Wall-clock timeout for the reindex CLI call. Falls back silently when exceeded.
